title: China continues to grapple with its own set of economic challenges
section_path: China continues to grapple with its own set of economic challenges
section_path_text: China continues to grapple with its own set of economic challenges
summary:
Main
By Michalis Voutsinas
"Whilst not many things have changed in the spot market during the last few trading days, a historic US credit rating downgrade by rating company Fitch made headlines, sending shockwaves in stock markets across the globe. On Tuesday, Fitch cut its US credit rating from triple A to double A plus, citing a mounting government debt burden and the debt ceiling stand-off that two months ago brought the world's largest economy on the verge of a default. Following the surprise downgrade, US stocks had their biggest one-day drop in months, joining a global sell-off.
